CustomField.description: Hourly ETA-recalculation feature flag. Null = hourly auto-recalc disabled (DeliveryHubScheduler.recalcWorkItemETAsIfTopOfHour() short-circuits). Set DateTime = enabled-since (audit trail · matches existing EnableXxxDateTime__c convention). Subscribers who manage WorkItem dates manually (e.g. preserving true historical Start dates) should leave this null. Default is null on org-defaults — auto-recalc is opt-in.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set DateTime to enable hourly ETA auto-recalc. Blank = subscriber manages dates manually.
CustomField.label: Enable ETA Auto-Recalc DateTime
